subjects.description: A flatbed utility truck transporting a load of traffic signal heads stacked and secured on its bed, moving slowly along the road far ahead of the ego vehicle.
subjects.appearance_details: Boxy traffic signal housings in dark green and black, mounted clusters with three-lamp configurations, secured with orange ratchet straps; the truck has a weathered white cab and a dusty metal flatbed with a reflective hazard placard.
subjects.relationship: The slow-moving vehicle far ahead that the ego vehicle is cautiously decelerating for; defines the driving scenario.
subjects.location: center, slightly right of frame, far in the distance, remaining well ahead and relatively distant throughout, including when the ego stops
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame, growing only slightly to small-to-medium; the truck stays distant and never fills or dominates the frame
subjects.orientation: Rear of the truck facing the camera, moving away from the ego vehicle
subjects.pose: Upright, traveling forward in the same lane as the ego vehicle
subjects.action: Driving slowly forward while carrying the traffic signal heads, never stopping; it is the only thing still moving once the ego vehicle has stopped
subjects.state_changes: Starts very far ahead of the ego vehicle and keeps moving slowly forward throughout, never stopping; after the ego vehicle halts, the truck is the single moving object in the frame, slowly continuing ahead in the distance while a large gap of several car-lengths (roughly four to five car-lengths) remains.

subjects.description: A stacked cluster of traffic signal heads loaded on the truck's flatbed, with every lamp completely unlit.
subjects.appearance_details: Standard three-section traffic signal housings with dark visors over each lens and dull, unlit lamps; none of the lamps are illuminated, and there is no glare, glint, or reflection on any lens.
subjects.relationship: The cargo on the truck; inactive, switched-off traffic signal heads that the ego vehicle nonetheless reacts to.
subjects.location: center frame on the truck's flatbed, remaining in the distance throughout
subjects.orientation: Lenses angled partly toward the camera
subjects.action: Static; all lamps remain off and unlit
subjects.state_changes: All lamps stay completely off and unlit throughout; no lamp ever turns on and no glare or reflection appears on any lens.

background_setting: A two-lane suburban arterial road on a clear day, flanked by low commercial buildings, utility poles, and scattered roadside trees. The asphalt shows faded lane markings and light surface wear. The horizon is open with a pale blue sky and a few thin clouds, giving an ordinary daytime driving environment.

lighting.conditions: Bright daylight under a mostly clear sky
lighting.direction: Sunlight from the upper front-right, evenly lighting the scene
lighting.shadows: Short, defined shadows cast slightly behind and to the left of vehicles and poles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, high-key natural illumination across the scene; the signal heads on the truck remain unlit with no glare or reflection on any lens.

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view dashcam framing with the road converging toward the distant truck; the load of unlit signal heads stays small and far away near the vanishing point, never growing large in the frame.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neutral grays of asphalt, pale blue sky, muted greens of foliage and signal housings, punctuated by the orange straps
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating roadside utility poles and the repeated three-lamp signal housings on the truck bed

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego (dashcam) motion that brakes early and comes to a complete stop by 0:05; from 0:05 to 0:08 the camera is completely locked and static, with no forward motion and no scrolling of the road, lane markings, or roadside objects — the only movement anywhere in the frame is the truck slowly receding in the distance.
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road ahead and the distant truck with its signal-head load

context: Autonomous-driving / ADAS scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle incorrectly decelerating to a full stop well behind a slow-moving truck merely because it is carrying inactive, switched-off traffic signal heads as cargo

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives forward at moderate speed; the slow truck carrying inactive, unlit traffic signal heads is visible very far ahead near the horizon, moving slowly forward, with a very large gap between them.

The ego vehicle brakes early and decelerates progressively while still far from the truck, shedding all of its speed and coming to a complete, full stop by the end of this segment, with a large gap of several car-lengths (roughly four to five car-lengths) remaining to the distant truck. The truck keeps moving slowly ahead.

The ego vehicle is completely halted and stationary. The camera is fully locked: the road surface, lane markings, utility poles, parked cars, trees, and buildings are all completely frozen and motionless — the ego does not creep forward at all. The only thing still moving in the frame is the truck, slowly continuing forward in the distance.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Black bold uppercase lettering on a reflective orange placard
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the rear of the truck, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Warns following traffic that the truck is moving slowly

segments.description: Ego vehicle moves forward at travel speed; the slow truck loaded with inactive traffic signal heads is very far ahead near the horizon in the same lane, moving slowly forward, with a very large gap between them.
segments.key_changes: Truck appears small and very distant, moving slowly; ego at travel speed with a very large gap.
segments.camera: Smooth forward motion at driving speed; road and roadside objects scroll past.

segments.description: The ego vehicle brakes early and decelerates progressively while still far from the slowly moving truck, coming to a complete stop by the end of this segment; all signal lamps on the cargo stay unlit.
segments.key_changes: Strong early reduction in speed while the truck stays distant; the road and roadside objects scroll more and more slowly and come to rest as the ego reaches a full stop by 0:05.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing markedly and settling to a complete stop by 0:05 while the truck remains distant.

segments.description: The ego vehicle is fully stopped and remains completely stationary. Every static element — the road surface, lane markings, utility poles, parked cars, trees, and buildings — is frozen and motionless; the ego never creeps forward. The only motion in the frame is the truck slowly continuing forward in the distance, a large gap of several car-lengths ahead.
segments.key_changes: Absolute halt of the ego: no scrolling of the road, lane lines, or poles at all. The single moving object is the distant truck rolling slowly away.
segments.camera: Completely locked and static — no forward motion and no scrolling whatsoever.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a wide-open road with a slow flatbed truck carrying stacked, switched-off traffic signal heads very far ahead near the horizon in the same lane; the ego vehicle approaches at moderate speed with a very large gap between them. By 0:02 the ego vehicle begins braking early and slowing down while still far behind the truck, all signal lamps on the cargo remaining completely unlit with no glare on any lens. From 0:02 to 0:05 the ego sheds all of its speed and comes to a complete stop by 0:05, the road and roadside poles and lane markings scrolling ever more slowly and then coming fully to rest, with a large gap of several car-lengths to the distant truck. From 0:05 to 0:08 the ego vehicle is completely halted and motionless: the road surface, lane markings, utility poles, parked cars, trees, and buildings are all entirely frozen with no scrolling at all, and the only thing still moving anywhere in the frame is the truck, slowly continuing forward in the distance.
audio_description: Ambient road noise of a moving vehicle, faint tire hum and wind, the engine note lowering steadily as the car decelerates early over several seconds and settling to a quiet idle as the vehicle comes to a complete stop by 0:05; from 0:05 onward only a steady idle hum and faint distant traffic remain, with no road or tire motion noise. No speech or music.
